turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, you've reached the cancellations team. What can I do for you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just so you're aware, we record these calls for training.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I'm moving to a different service, so I need to cancel.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, I can help with that. Let me check what's on the account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood. I'll set the cancellation to process at the end of the period.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: How much would that discount actually be?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I asked to cancel, not for a sales pitch. Get me a manager.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Fair enough. I'll escalate so a manager can finalize this.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. Sorry to see you go, and thanks for being with us.
